title: sida rhombifolia var. retusa
intro: Sida rhombifolia var. retusa, also known as the retuse sida plant, is a variant of the Sida rhombifolia species, which is a type of flowering plant in the Malvaceae family. The retuse sida plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
